reason: This workflow captures evidence and drift inputs. Applying standards or templates should remain a separate reviewed write workflow.
followUp: Use a future tenant-remediation workflow with explicit approvals.

reason: Several Exchange Online Protection and Defender for Office settings require Exchange Online PowerShell or dedicated Security APIs.
followUp: Run a separate Exchange app-only workflow after certificate-based Exchange permissions are configured.

reason: Tenant-wide OneDrive content and quota details require additional SharePoint/Sites permissions and should be isolated from app-packaging workflow scopes.
followUp: Add Sites.Read.All/Sites.FullControl.All only in tenants that need SharePoint evidence.

reason: Breach, dark-web, GeoIP, and community-template functions need external providers. This workflow only runs Microsoft Graph and repository-backed evidence.
followUp: Wire external providers through Modern Dev Mgmt integrations before dispatching from tenant repos.
